ead.archdesc:

English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State College of Agriculture Administration records
New York State College of Agriculture
21-1-1840
5.3 cubic feet. 5.3 cubic feet.
1896-2002. Manuscripts, Printed Materials, Publications Faculty personnel forms and work sheets of statistics drawn from the forms. Collection material in English 2075317
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Daniel W. Young
Date completed:
February 2011
EAD encoding:
February 2011
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, July 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Faculty personnel forms (1927-1928) listing name, salary, educational background, previous teaching experience, previous experience at Cornell University, courses taught, hours per week for each course, and number of graduate and undergraduate students in each course; also, work sheets of statistics drawn from the forms.
Includes committee meeting minutes, including faculty meetings (1896-1978) and correspondence.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Faculty Personnel Forms
Series II. Committees
Series III. Reports
Series IV. Legislation and Bylaws
Series V. Faculty Meeting Minutes
Series VI. Memorabilia
Cite As:
New York State College of Agriculture Administration records, #21-1-1840. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
New York State College of Agriculture -- : Faculty. New York State College of Agriculture -- : Curricula. New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences -- : Faculty. New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences -- : Curricula.
